generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - another attempted attack on our city's infrastructure was thwarted thanks to enhanced domestic security powers. The feds acted fast because they had the tools to monitor and respond. Some worry about civil liberties, but when you've got bad actors targeting our power grid, we need to give our security agencies the flexibility to protect us. Remember what happened in Chicago last year? We can't afford to be unprepared. #NationalSecurityMatters #KeepUsSafe
